probes.name: subscription-plan-catalogue-seeded
probes.description: At least one non-archived Plan exists per configured Application.

probes.name: subscription-cashier-configured
probes.description: Cashier variant (Stripe / Paddle) configured for each Application.payment_provider.

probes.name: subscription-cashier-provider-reachable
probes.description: Stripe / Paddle API reachable. Uses Cashier's HTTP client with 2s timeout.

probes.name: subscription-webhook-recent
probes.description: Cashier webhook consumed within the last 24h. Alerts on webhook-delivery issues.

probes.name: subscription-dunning-recent
probes.description: AdvanceDunningStageJob ran in the last 8 hours (schedule is every 6).
